name: Bigby, the Grasping Hand Eternal
damage_resistances: necrotic; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks

traits.name: Regeneration
traits.desc: Bigby regains 20 hit points at the start of his turn if he has at least 1 hit point and hasn't taken radiant damage since the end of his last turn.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (2/Day)
traits.desc: If Bigby fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Spider Climb
traits.desc: Bigby can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

traits.name: Misty Escape
traits.desc: When reduced to 0 hit points outside his resting place, Bigby transforms into a cloud of mist instead of falling unconscious.

traits.name: Spellcasting
traits.desc:
Bigby is a 20th-level spellcaster. His spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 19, +11 to hit with spell attacks). Bigby has the following wizard spells prepared:

Cantrips (at will): chill touch, mage hand, minor illusion
1st level (4 slots): mage armor, shield
2nd level (3 slots): mirror image, misty step
3rd level (3 slots): counterspell
4th level (3 slots): blight, greater invisibility
5th level (3 slots): wall of force
6th level (2 slots): disintegrate
7th level (2 slots): finger of death
8th level (1 slot): dominate monster
9th level (1 slot): power word kill

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Bigby makes one Necrotic Hand attack and casts one spell.

actions.name: Necrotic Hand
actions.desc: Melee Spell Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (3d8) necrotic damage. Bigby regains hit points equal to the necrotic damage dealt.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one grappled creature. Hit: 14 (4d6) necrotic damage, and the target's hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the necrotic damage taken.

actions.name: Profane Hand (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: Bigby summons or commands a massive shadowy hand. Choose one effect: Crushing Grip: +11 to hit, 4d8 + 5 necrotic damage, and the target is grappled and restrained. Grasping Slam: Each creature in a 20-foot-radius area must make a DC 19 Dexterity saving throw, taking 4d8 necrotic damage and falling prone on a failure. Force Interposition: The hand grants Bigby +5 AC until the start of his next turn. Areas affected by the hand become difficult terrain. A creature that enters one of these areas or starts its turn there must succeed on a DC 17 Strength saving throw or be restrained until the end of its turn.

actions.name: Fade into Nothing
actions.desc: While invisible, Bigby teleports up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space he can see.

reactions.name: Arcane Denial
reactions.desc: Bigby casts counterspell or imposes disadvantage on a spell attack made against him.

actions.name: Hand Attack
actions.desc: Bigby commands his Profane Hand to make an attack.

actions.name: Spell Surge (Costs 2 Actions)
actions.desc: Bigby casts a spell of 3rd level or lower.
